items.headline: Rock Island Arsenal Museum social media account to deactivate
items.summary: The Rock Island Arsenal Museum announced that its Facebook account will be deactivated by July 30.

items.headline: 'Iowa has saved my life': Swedish man goes viral for falling in love with Iowa
items.summary: Filip Johansson graduated from school in London, moved back home to Sweden, then realized he wanted to live somewhere completely different: Iowa.

items.headline: Rock Island County Sheriff's Office investigates multi-vehicle crash
items.summary: The crash occurred in the 10000 block of Route 150 on Thursday evening. Two people were transported to nearby hospitals for treatment.

items.headline: New central Iowa housing development aims to tackle state's small-town housing crisis
items.summary: Panora is tackling a housing shortage common in Iowa's small towns, with new developments aiming to boost community growth and attract business opportunities.

items.headline: Proposed Coal Valley sports complex draws concerns from neighbors
items.summary: The mayor says economic growth is important for the tax base. People living near the site worry about noise and traffic.

items.headline: Road closures, forecast and more: What to know ahead of the Quad-City Times Bix 7 this weekend
items.summary: What started with just 84 runners in 1975 has grown to thousands of participants. Here's a look at what's in store.
